Digital Presence Audit of Public Companies

 

1. Company General Information

Official Name

: DreamComeTrue

 

Tax Identification Code (CUI/IDNO)

: –

 

Website Audited

: –

 

Date of Audit

: July 31, 2025

 

Legal Notice and Galac-Web’s Right to Conduct Public Audits

The present audit was conducted lawfully, ethically, and objectively by GALAC-WEB S.R.L., a legally registered entity, which holds full rights to collect, analyze, and interpret publicly available information for purposes of research, public awareness, and professional advisory.

Legal Grounds Supporting This Right

1. Freedom of Expression and Access to Public Information
According to Articles 30 and 31 of the Romanian Constitution and Article 10 of the European Convention on Human Rights (ECHR), every individual or legal entity has the right to access and disseminate information of public interest, while respecting the dignity and rights of others.

2. Freedom of Information Laws

Law no. 544/2001 (Romania)

 

Law no. 982/2000 (Republic of Moldova)

 

These laws guarantee the right to access publicly available information, including content published on websites, social media platforms, public registries, and other official sources.

3. Regulation (EU) 2016/679 – General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
This report does not process or disclose personal data, but only evaluates publicly available information that was voluntarily published by the subject company (e.g., company name, registration code, website, reviews, social presence). Galac-Web does not process sensitive data, only assesses the level of digital transparency and public-facing ethics.

4. Commercial Right to Provide Analysis and Advisory Services
As a digital service provider, Galac-Web S.R.L. is legally entitled (as per its registered business activity) to conduct digital audits, market analysis, visibility studies, and advisory in the field of digital ethics and public reputation.

Ethical Disclaimer and Purpose of the Audit

This report:

Does

not constitute defamation or criticism

, but rather a

constructive advisory effort

.

Is

exclusively based on publicly available digital information

.

Does

not impose any penalties or sanctions

, but offers professional recommendations for improvement.

 

Right to Reply and Clarification

In accordance with legal and ethical standards, any audited entity has the right to reply, update, or request clarification.
Such requests may be submitted in writing to:

📧 info@galactrust.com

 

 

Observațiile Noastre

 

Summary Table (Based on Public Information)

Category

Status

Short Observation

Identity & Legality

🟢 OK

No clear legal registration found in open databases, but no explicit violations observed.

Image and UX

🟡 Partial

https://dctnetwork.info/ offers a visually strong presentation with structured layout. However, subdomains like https://dreamcometrue.ai/ and /event.html lack legal documents (terms, policies), and the company’s legal name is not clearly stated.

Technical Security

🟡 Partial

Website lacks multiple recommended security headers: HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, ClickJacking Protection, CSP. This exposes users to minor-to-moderate risks.

Public Reputation

🟢 OK

Shows high visibility with over 4,638,181 Google reviews, although this figure should be independently verified for authenticity.

SEO & Performance

🔴 Poor

Google PageSpeed Score: 54 on mobile / 96 on desktop. Poor mobile performance may affect user experience and SEO ranking.

Advertising Ethics

🟢 OK

No deceptive claims observed. Google reviews show strong user engagement.

Automation & Client Interaction

🔴 Lacking

No clear contact forms, live chat, or automated client support systems were found.

Social Responsibility

🔴 Lacking

Although the Facebook page "Dream Come True Information Technology" has 2.8K likes and 17K followers, no visible actions or declarations of social responsibility, ethics, or consumer commitment are present.

Recommendations

Legal and Policy Transparency

 

Add essential legal documents to the main domain and subdomains:

 

Terms & Conditions

Privacy Policy (GDPR-compliant)

Cookie Policy

Legal Entity Name and Contact Information

 

Technical Security Improvements

 

Implement the following HTTP headers to ensure a secure environment:

 

Strict-Transport-Security

X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff

Content-Security-Policy

X-Frame-Options: DENY

 

These are considered industry best practices to protect users from clickjacking, MIME sniffing, and other attacks.

 

Improve Mobile SEO and Loading Speed

 

Optimize mobile performance by reducing image sizes, enabling caching, and removing render-blocking resources. A score of 54/100 on mobile is below the minimum acceptable level for modern digital presence.

Clarify Legal Identity

 

Clearly display the name of the registered legal entity (company), with contact data and official jurisdiction, on all domains and communication channels.

Client Communication & Automation

 

Introduce a contact form, chatbot, or integration with WhatsApp/Telegram to support fast client communication and enhance credibility.

Social Responsibility Disclosure

 

Include a short statement or section on the website describing ethical principles, consumer protection practices, and community contributions. This increases trust and aligns with global business standards.

Conclusion

The DCT Network / Dream Come True platform presents a strong digital appearance on the surface (design and public visibility), but lacks legal transparency, technical security hardening, and ethical communication standards that are necessary for trust-based ecosystems.

While the number of followers and reviews is impressive, the absence of verified legal identity, security best practices, and public accountability poses a moderate-to-high reputational risk, especially in the fintech, blockchain, or investment context.

To align with Galac Trust standards and international best practices, the entity must demonstrate:

Transparency,

Authentic engagement,

User protection mechanisms.

Until these issues are resolved, the platform cannot be considered fully trustworthy from a digital ethics and compliance standpoint.
